meta.title: Model Prism — Multi-Tenant LLM Gateway | ohara.systems
meta.description: Multi-tenant LLM gateway with intelligent routing and cost control. Drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API — for your entire organization.

home.description: Multi-tenant LLM gateway with intelligent routing, self-optimizing model selection, and cost tracking — OpenAI-compatible.

overview.description: The OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway for teams — with intelligent routing, self-optimizing model selection, multi-tenant isolation, and granular cost control. Self-hosted, deployed in minutes.

highlights.title: Intelligent Routing
highlights.description: Automatic model selection by cost, latency, and task type.

highlights.title: Self-Optimizing
highlights.description: Built-in Benchmark Agent fine-tunes routing from real traffic — automatically.

highlights.title: Multi-Tenant
highlights.description: Full isolation between teams, projects, and customers.

highlights.title: Cost Control
highlights.description: Budget limits, real-time tracking, and detailed usage logging.

enterpriseCta.title: Curious about the difference between Free and Enterprise?
enterpriseCta.description: Multi-tenant management, LDAP/SSO, budget limits, self-optimizing routing, priority support — see the full comparison →

hero.description: Multi-tenant LLM gateway with intelligent routing, self-optimizing model selection, and cost control. Drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API — for your entire organization.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Model Prism bundles all critical features of a production-ready LLM gateway into a single, easily deployable service.

items.title: Intelligent Auto-Routing
items.description: 8-tier routing with classifier-based model selection. Automatic provider failover with circuit breaker, context-aware model upgrades, A/B testing with statistical analysis, and automated quality scoring on every response.

items.title: Self-Optimizing Routing & AI Testing
items.description: Built-in Benchmark Agent, Test Route dry-run with step-by-step trace, and AI-powered Synthetic Tests — generate test prompts, run them against your routing config, and get actionable quality and cost suggestions. Choose any model for generation and evaluation.

items.title: Multi-Tenant & RBAC
items.description: Full tenant isolation with multiple API keys per tenant, usage quotas (hard/soft/auto-economy), HMAC-signed webhooks for budget and provider events, and RBAC at tenant and model level with LDAP/SSO integration.

items.title: Real-Time Cost Control
items.description: Token-accurate cost tracking per tenant, model, and time period. Budget alerts with automatic throttling, usage quotas, full audit trail of every request, and detailed analytics dashboards with session grouping.

items.title: OpenAI-Compatible API & Built-in Chat
items.description: Drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API — no code changes required. Supports Chat Completions, Embeddings, and Function Calling. Includes a lightweight WebChat with SSE streaming, model selection, and auto-routing — no WebSockets needed.

items.title: Air-gapped & Scalable
items.description: Fully offline with OFFLINE=true — no outbound connections, no telemetry. Stateless architecture for horizontal scaling, Kubernetes-ready with Helm chart. Node 22 with zero CVEs.

items.title: Privacy by Default
items.description: All prompt logging is disabled by default — no user data is captured unless an admin explicitly enables it. When enabled, prompt content is stored AES-256-GCM encrypted in the database. Unique user tracking uses anonymized IP hashes (SHA-256), never raw IPs. You stay in control of what is logged.

quickStart.title: Up and running in 5 minutes
quickStart.subtitle: Start Model Prism instantly with Docker Compose. No database setup, no complex configuration.

tabs.label: Docker Compose
tabs.code:
# 1. Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/ai-ohara-systems/model-prism
cd model-prism

# 2. Start
docker compose up -d

# → Setup wizard: http://localhost:3000

# 3. Test — drop-in for OpenAI API
curl http://localhost:3000/api/api/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer omp-your-api-key" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "auto", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]}'

tabs.label: Docker Run
tabs.code:
# 1. Start MongoDB
docker run -d --name model-prism-mongo \
  -p 27017:27017 \
  -v model-prism-data:/data/db \
  mongo:7

# 2. Start Model Prism
docker run -d --name model-prism \
  -p 3000:3000 \
  -e MONGO_URI=mongodb://host.docker.internal:27017/openmodelprism \
  -e JWT_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32) \
  -e ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(openssl rand -hex 16) \
  ghcr.io/ai-ohara-systems/model-prism:latest

# → Setup wizard: http://localhost:3000

tabs.label: Kubernetes
tabs.code:
# 1. Add Helm repo
helm repo add ohara https://ai-ohara-systems.github.io/ohara-helm
helm repo update

# 2. Install
helm install model-prism ohara/model-prism \
  --namespace model-prism \
  --create-namespace

# 3. Port-forward to setup wizard
kubectl port-forward svc/model-prism 3000:80 -n model-prism

# → Setup wizard: http://localhost:3000

providers.title: Supported Providers
providers.subtitle: Model Prism connects to all major LLM providers through unified adapters.
footnotes: * VPC Endpoint support available (OpenAI, AWS Bedrock)
** Supports the OpenAI Spec with specific settings like "System Proxy" and so on

bottomCta.title: Ready to deploy Model Prism?
bottomCta.description: Source Available (ELv2), production-ready. Fully air-gapped with OFFLINE=true — no outbound connections. Enterprise license available for advanced features.
